key.name: chime-style
key.summary: Chime style: off, speech, sound, sound-speech

key.name: chime-sound
key.summary: Filename of the hourly chime sound

key.name: intermediate-enabled
key.summary: Use a different sound for intermediate (quarter/half hour) chimes

key.name: intermediate-sound
key.summary: Filename of the intermediate (quarter/half hour) chime sound
